components.name: ncmdump
components.notes: Place the signed macOS executable here before distribution.

components.name: apple-music-downloader
components.notes: Project-private macOS executable embedded in the app bundle. Runtime config is generated from ThirdParty/apple-music-downloader/config.yaml.template under the app-managed shared container.

managedDockerImages.name: Apple Music wrapper
managedDockerImages.notes: The wrapper is not embedded as a macOS executable. Get Oudio uses Docker CLI with the Colima context to pull and run this amd64 image with an app-managed rootfs/data directory.
